## What and why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Related requirement

<!-- Which problem-statement requirement (R1–R8) or issue does this serve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes (≥ 95% thresholds hold)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Added/updated tests, including an error path where relevant
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages; no generated files committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or setup changed
